description_long: This is a low-polygon representation of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a feminine physique and casual urban attire. The figure features a fitted short-sleeve top and slim pants, with the top tucked in and the pants ending at the ankles. The shoes are heeled and closed-toe, adding a touch of formality to the otherwise casual outfit. The head is adorned with a medium-length, voluminous hairstyle that frames the face and neck. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the overall body proportions are realistic, with visible anatomical features such as the chest, waist, and hips. The model is designed for use in urban environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or public spaces.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with a feminine build, wearing a fitted top, slim pants, and heeled shoes, with medium-length hair and arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and full frontal details of the clothing and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the side silhouette of the body and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, torso, and legs, with the arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, chest, and the side silhouette of the body and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve top and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
